title: DR Scholl – Qtto Medi Sleeping Compression Socks From Japan
detail_text: The compression tightens your calves and gives you a comfortable tightening feeling while you sleep. Your legs felt refreshed the next morning. Just wear them to bed on days when you want to take care of your legs that have worked hard all day, when your legs don't feel as refreshed as usual, or when you want to take care of your beautiful legs in preparation for the next day. MediQtto is recommended for your daily habit of beautiful legs while sleeping. MediQotto comfortable sleep design provides the appropriate compression level for sleeping, effectively tightening your legs while you sleep comfortably. The cotton feel material provides both firm compression and soft texture. Short type that tightens up to your calves. Graduated pressure design based on medical science. MediQtto has its roots in British medical stockings. The pressure value is designed based on the British pressure value standard. Just by wearing them, the compression will tighten your legs. Size: M/L Color: Lavender Material: Nylon, polyester, polyurethane, cupra Manufacturing: Japan Long Version Short Version

title: +MD 15-20 mmHg Medical Compression Stockings for Women and Men Thigh High Dot-Top Open Toe Socks for Varicose Vein Swollen legs Travel Flight Pregnant
detail_text: 60%Nylon,40%Spandex Graduated compression technology is greatest at the ankle (15-20mmHg) and decreases gradually up the leg to improve healthy circulation. Silicone band for wearing comfort yet snugly fit to ensure the stockings remain in place without constricting your leg. Please note that if you are allergic to silicone, you should order with caution. Open-toe design allows for additional sizing flexibility relative to individual foot length, as well as providing additional ventilation. Perfect fit: Measure according to our size chart. If this is your first time to purchase compression socks or stockings, we suggest that you select One Size Bigger. Comes with Easy-to-wear foot slider accessory to help you slip on your stockings easily. Recommended for: Minor Varicose Veins, Minor Spider Veins, Edema, DVT, Post-Surgery, Swelling in Ankles Calf Feet, Enlarged Bulging Veins, Pregnant Nursing Expecting Mothers (when indicated by a doctor), Travel (prevents blood pooling and clots in frequent flyers), Tired Aching Legs, Muscle Recovery Post Cardio Workout and Exercise. Beauty Shaping and Leg Contouring.

page_json.name: +MD 15-20 mmHg Medical Compression Stockings for Women and Men Thigh High Dot-Top Open Toe Socks for Varicose Vein Swollen legs Travel Flight Pregnant
page_json.category: Sports Shoes and Clothing > Sports Accessories
page_json.description: Brand: MD. Material: 60%Nylon, 40%Spandex. Quantity: 1Pairs. Size: S M L XL. Item Number: WP15MD446. Place of origin: China. 60%Nylon, 40%Spandex. Graduated compression technology is greatest at the ankle 15-20mmHg and decreases gradually up the leg to improve healthy circulation. Silicone band for wearing comfort yet snugly fit to ensure the stockings remain in place without constricting your leg. Please note that if you are allergic to silicone, you should order with caution. Open-toe design allows for additional sizing flexibility relative to individual foot length, as well as providing additional ventilation. Perfect fit: Measure according to our size chart. If this is your first time to purchase compression socks or stockings, we suggest that you select One Size Bigger. Comes with Easy-to-wear foot slider accessory to help you slip on your stockings easily. Recommended for: Minor Varicose Veins, Minor Spider Veins, Edema, DVT, Post-Surgery, Swelling in Ankles Calf Feet, Enlarged B

title: Buzesty Medical Compression Pantyhose for Women & Men, 20-30mmHg Graduated Support Tights, Opaque Footless / Closed Toe / Open Toe Waist High Compression Stockings & Leggings for Varicose Veins, Edema, Flight, DVT
detail_text: Specifications BrandCARBIN KONEERSKU13695746968_SGAMZ-124590916460Functionalitylightweight,Breathable,Abrasion Resistance,Quick-drying,Elasticity & Stretch,4-Way Stretch,Compression Support,Easy-care & Anti-stainSports MaterialNylon What’s in the box 1 Pair Medical Compression Pantyhose Highlights GRADUARED COMPRESSION：The 5 intervals of 20-30 mmHg graduated compression deliver a compression action to the leg that is greatest at the ankle, decreasing gradually up the leg, towards the heart. The pantyhose helps reduce and prevent swelling for the wearer, maintaining positive circulation and leg health. Its level of compression is comfortable and safe, perfect for use after surgery THERAPEUTIC EFFECT: Beister high waist graduated compression tights for women & men are formulated with gradient compression technology to help with leg swelling, spider and varicose veins, cellulitis, blood circulation, post phlebectomy, leg pain, venous insufficiency, blood clots, DVT and after sclerotherapy LUXURIOUS COMFORT： Content 70% nylon , 25%spandex, 5% elastane for optimal stretch and durability.These opaque open toe medical compression tights provide maximum strength and hiding power, breathable materialstrengthen elastic waist & crotch junction help to avoid the problem of waist slip down and easy tearing of the crotch region PERFECT FIT：The top elastic band will fit snugly around your tummy without causing any slippage, soft & comfortable, non-constrictingavoiding any build-up on your legs, causing no extra pain to your tummy or legs, not to mention leaving unsightly marks on your tummy, provided you choose the right size APPLICABLE GROUP: Designed for teachers, nurses, people with varicose veins, pregnant women, flight attendants, people who stand for long periods of time，etc. Beister compression tights which promotes blood circulation, helps relieve tired, aching, fatigued legs Description If you want to report an issue with this item Click Here VIEW MORE

brand.name: CARBIN KONEER
brand.suggestion: More Sports Accessories from CARBIN KONEER

product.highlights:
• GRADUARED COMPRESSION：The 5 intervals of 20-30 mmHg graduated compression deliver a compression action to the leg that is greatest at the ankle, decreasing gradually up the leg, towards the heart. The pantyhose helps reduce and prevent swelling for the wearer, maintaining positive circulation and leg health. Its level of compression is comfortable and safe, perfect for use after surgery
  • THERAPEUTIC EFFECT: Beister high waist graduated compression tights for women & men are formulated with gradient compression technology to help with leg swelling, spider and varicose veins, cellulitis, blood circulation, post phlebectomy, leg pain, venous insufficiency, blood clots, DVT and after sclerotherapy
  • LUXURIOUS COMFORT： Content 70% nylon , 25%spandex, 5% elastane for optimal stretch and durability.These opaque open toe medical compression tights provide maximum strength and hiding power, breathable materialstrengthen elastic waist & crotch junction help to avoid the problem of waist slip down and easy tearing of the crotch region
  • PERFECT FIT：The top elastic band will fit snugly around your tummy without causing any slippage, soft & comfortable, non-constrictingavoiding any build-up on your legs, causing no extra pain to your tummy or legs, not to mention leaving unsightly marks on your tummy, provided you choose the right size
  • APPLICABLE GROUP: Designed for teachers, nurses, people with varicose veins, pregnant women, flight attendants, people who stand for long periods of time，etc. Beister compression tights which promotes blood circulation, helps relieve tired, aching, fatigued legs

page_json.name: Buzesty Medical Compression Pantyhose for Women & Men, 20-30mmHg Graduated Support Tights, Opaque Footless / Closed Toe / Open Toe Waist High Compression Stockings & Leggings for Varicose Veins, Edema, Flight, DVT
page_json.category: Sports Shoes and Clothing > Sports Accessories
page_json.description: CARBIN KONEER. GRADUARED COMPRESSION The 5 intervals of 20-30 mmHg graduated compression deliver a compression action to the leg that is greatest at the ankle, decreasing gradually up the leg, towards the heart. The pantyhose helps reduce and prevent swelling for the wearer, maintaining positive circulation and leg health. Its level of compression is comfortable and safe, perfect for use after surgery. THERAPEUTIC EFFECT: Beister high waist graduated compression tights for women men are formulated with gradient compression technology to help with leg swelling, spider and varicose veins, cellulitis, blood circulation, post phlebectomy, leg pain, venous insufficiency, blood clots, DVT and after sclerotherapy. LUXURIOUS COMFORT Content 70 nylon, 25%spandex, 5 elastane for optimal stretch and durability. These opaque open toe medical compression tights provide maximum strength and hiding power, breathable materialstrengthen elastic waist crotch junction help to avoid the problem of waist s

title: +MD 20-30 mmHg Medical Compression Socks for Men and Women Opaque Knee High Medical Support Socks
detail_text: Material: 74.9% Nylon, 25.1% Spandex Utilizing specialized medical grade fabrics and fabricating machinery to make the socks breathble and provide accurate graduated compression Knit heel pocket keeps garment in place and for proper fit and durable. Anti-slip band on the top ensures stocking remains in place throughout the day Graduated Compression: The compression level is highest around the ankle and lessens towards the top of the stocking. The compression technology can promote blood circulation and oxygenation, preventing fatigue and swelling, relieving from varicose veins,orthostatic hypotension and deep vein thromboses. 20-30 mmHg compresison socks commonly used for everyday wear, travel, leg health, prolonged sitting or standing. Recommended for teachers, nurses, flight attendant, salesman, postoperative,and patience with minor varicose veins Measure according to size chart image. Moderate strength 20-30 mmHg socks could be worn daily, please take a size up if you are between size or you purchase compression socks for the first time

detail_text: Product introduction: Effect on human internal circulation: Accelerate the blood circulation, increase the blood flow of the human meridians by 30%, accelerate the venous blood to return to the heart, increase the arterial blood flow, so as to improve the oxygen content of the blood, enhance the anti fatigue, speed up metabolism, and recover the physical strength faster to achieve excellent performance. Effect on human muscle: Reduce muscle vibration and stabilize muscles. (Muscle vibration is one of the main reasons for fatigue) At the same time, there is no sense of tightening, which is mainly due to the gradient pressure value of compression technology, so that the compression force conforms to ergonomic design, and the compression force is in a gradient decreasing mode. Effects on human health: It can effectively reduce lactic acid accumulation and avoid muscle soreness after exercise. The medical grade gradient compression method can reduce the vein diameter and push deoxygenated blood back to the heart, thereby improving the vein health and preventing varicose veins. Product features: 1. Fast sweat wicking: The product uses fast drying breathable fabric, combined with the mesh design of the developed part of the foot sweat glands, to accelerate the release of damp and heat. 2. Comfortable fit: elastic compression process with free retraction and retraction makes it close to the body. 3. Anti slip and wear-resistant: the offset strip hollow weave is used outside the sole to enhance friction and improve sports performance. Product list: a pair of compression socks
detail_html:
Product introduction:
Effect on human internal circulation:
Accelerate the blood circulation, increase the blood flow of the human meridians by 30%, accelerate the venous blood to return to the heart, increase the arterial blood flow, so as to improve the oxygen content of the blood, enhance the anti fatigue, speed up metabolism, and recover the physical strength faster to achieve excellent performance.
Effect on human muscle:
Reduce muscle vibration and stabilize muscles. (Muscle vibration is one of the main reasons for fatigue) At the same time, there is no sense of tightening, which is mainly due to the gradient pressure value of compression technology, so that the compression force conforms to ergonomic design, and the compression force is in a gradient decreasing mode.
Effects on human health:
It can effectively reduce lactic acid accumulation and avoid muscle soreness after exercise. The medical grade gradient compression method can reduce the vein diameter and push deoxygenated blood back to the heart, thereby improving the vein health and preventing varicose veins.
Product features:
1. Fast sweat wicking: The product uses fast drying breathable fabric, combined with the mesh design of the developed part of the foot sweat glands, to accelerate the release of damp and heat.
2. Comfortable fit: elastic compression process with free retraction and retraction makes it close to the body.
3. Anti slip and wear-resistant: the offset strip hollow weave is used outside the sole to enhance friction and improve sports performance.
Product list: a pair of compression socks

product.desc:
Product introduction:
Effect on human internal circulation:
Accelerate the blood circulation, increase the blood flow of the human meridians by 30%, accelerate the venous blood to return to the heart, increase the arterial blood flow, so as to improve the oxygen content of the blood, enhance the anti fatigue, speed up metabolism, and recover the physical strength faster to achieve excellent performance.
Effect on human muscle:
Reduce muscle vibration and stabilize muscles. (Muscle vibration is one of the main reasons for fatigue) At the same time, there is no sense of tightening, which is mainly due to the gradient pressure value of compression technology, so that the compression force conforms to ergonomic design, and the compression force is in a gradient decreasing mode.
Effects on human health:
It can effectively reduce lactic acid accumulation and avoid muscle soreness after exercise. The medical grade gradient compression method can reduce the vein diameter and push deoxygenated blood back to the heart, thereby improving the vein health and preventing varicose veins.
Product features:
1. Fast sweat wicking: The product uses fast drying breathable fabric, combined with the mesh design of the developed part of the foot sweat glands, to accelerate the release of damp and heat.
2. Comfortable fit: elastic compression process with free retraction and retraction makes it close to the body.
3. Anti slip and wear-resistant: the offset strip hollow weave is used outside the sole to enhance friction and improve sports performance.
Product list: a pair of compression socks

page_json.description: Product name: large compression socks Fabric composition: spandex+nylon Product size: 3XL, 4XL, 5XL, 6XL Product color: black, skin color Product introduction: Effect on human internal circulation: Accelerate the blood circulation, increase the blood flow of the human meridians by 30%, accelerate the venous blood to return to the heart, increase the arterial blood flow, so as to improve the oxygen content of the blood, enhance the anti fatigue, speed up metabolism, and recover the physical strength faster to achieve excellent performance. Effect on human muscle: Reduce muscle vibration and stabilize muscles. (Muscle vibration is one of the main reasons for fatigue) At the same time, there is no sense of tightening, which is mainly due to the gradient pressure value of compression technology, so that the compression force conforms to ergonomic design, and the compression force is in a gradient decreasing mode. Effects on human health: It can effectively reduce lactic acid accumulation and avoid muscle soreness after exercise. The medical grade gradient compression method can reduce the vein diameter and push deoxygenated blood back to the heart, thereby improving the vein health and preventing varicose veins. Product features: 1. Fast sweat wicking: The product uses fast drying breathable fabric, combined with the mesh design of the developed part of the foot sweat glands, to accelerate the release of damp and heat. 2. Comfortable fit: elastic compression process with free retraction and retraction makes it close to the body. 3. Anti slip and wear-resistant: the offset strip hollow weave is used outside the sole to enhance friction and improve sports performance. Product list: a pair of compression socks

title: +MD 15-20mmHg Compression Socks for Women and Men Knee High Open Toe Medical Compression Stockings Varicose Vein Swollen legs Travel
detail_text: Material: Nylon 82.8% spandex 17.2%. ntroduction:This medical compression stocking has a compression ratio of 15-20 mmHg graduated compression. It ensures that proper pressure is applied at a particular level from your upper ankle to your lower leg. When worn often, compression socks are very beneficial providing good circulation of the blood flow in the feet and legs. It can help combat aching, swelling and general discomfort that usually accompanies them. Recommended for: Minor Varicose Veins, Minor Spider Veins, Edema, DVT, Post-Surgery, Swelling in Ankles Calf Feet, Enlarged Bulging Veins, Pregnant Nursing Expecting Mothers (when indicated by a doctor), Travel (prevents blood pooling and clots in frequent flyers), Tired Aching Legs, Muscle Recovery Post Cardio Workout and Exercise. Beauty Shaping and Leg Contouring. Care Instruction: To protect the socks/stockings, make sure to place them in a mesh laundry bag and use warm water and a mild detergent. Note: You shouldn’t use them if you have nerve damage in your legs or another condition that affects skin sensation, peripheral arterial disease, a history of a peripheral arterial bypass grafting, a skin infection on your feet or legs, dermatitis with oozing or fragile skin, massive leg swelling, or a pulmonary edema from congestive heart failure. Better consult your doctor first.

page_json.category: Sports Shoes and Clothing > Sports Accessories
page_json.description: Brand: MD. Material: 82.8 Nylon 17.2 Spandex. Quantity: 2Pairs. Size: S M L XL. Item Number: WP15MD461. Place of origin: China. Material: Nylon 82.8 spandex 17.2%. ntroduction: This medical compression stocking has a compression ratio of 15-20 mmHg graduated compression. It ensures that proper pressure is applied at a particular level from your upper ankle to your lower leg. When worn often, compression socks are very beneficial providing good circulation of the blood flow in the feet and legs. It can help combat aching, swelling and general discomfort that usually accompanies them. Recommended for: Minor Varicose Veins, Minor Spider Veins, Edema, DVT, Post-Surgery, Swelling in Ankles Calf Feet, Enlarged Bulging Veins, Pregnant Nursing Expecting Mothers when indicated by a doctor), Travel prevents blood pooling and clots in frequent flyers), Tired Aching Legs, Muscle Recovery Post Cardio Workout and Exercise. page_json.description: Plain Compression Socks Man

title: Cofoe 1 Pair Thigh Compression Socks Level 2 Varicose Sock 23-32 mmHg Pressure Open Toe Leggings Compression Stockings for Men Women Anti-varicose Veins Eliminate Edema
detail_text: The product is classified as assisted stockings for use, imposing certain amount of pressure on legs to prevent blood clot around legs and varicosity. Applicable people: 1.People who keep standing for long time, such as teachers,policemen,cosmetologists,shopping guides, doctors and nurses. 2. People sitting for long time: IT practitioners, white collar workers and civil servants. These people tend to stand or sit for long time. The subsequent muscle fatigue and gravitation could lead to improper backflow of blood in legs and further lower extremity venous-related diseases. 3. women and those who keep taking contraceptives —internal hormone alters and weight increases during pregnancy, the fetus and enlarged womb oppress pelvic venous and iliac vein, venous pressure increase in legs, all these could lead to improper backflow of blood in legs and further lower extremity venous-related diseases. 4. People who frequently take business trips by plane and coach like stewardess are vulnerable to “economy class syndrome” owing to the improper backflow of blood in legs caused by weightlessness at high altitude. They may fall victim to lower extremity venous-related diseases and even pulmonary embolism. 5. People suffering obesity. High-level cholesterol and lipid in blood can make blood backflow difficult, causing lower extremity venous-related diseases. 6. People who are much likely to fall victim to deep venous thrombosis, such as those suffering from malignant tumors, hemiplegic symptoms and broken legs and people just received an operation, women at the final stage of pregnancy and delivery women as well as the elderly. 7. People who want to have well-shaped legs and those going through liposuction. The stockings can compress, lift, pull and group the muscles in legs to prevent sagging and remedy shape of legs. Notes: Please allow 1-2cm(0.4-0.8") differences due to manual measurement, thanks.

product.highlights:
• The product is classified as assisted stockings for use, imposing certain amount of pressure on legs to prevent blood clot around legs and varicosit
  • Gently press on leg muscles and fat, consume leg energy, prevent sagging, raise leg line, reduce leg circumference, and keep leg shape
  • It is suitable for people with obvious varicose veins in the lower extremities and discomfort in the legs. Such as: leg pain, fatigue, numbness, itching, hyperpigmentation, patients after varicose vein surgery
  • Eliminate lower extremity edema of women in the third trimester, prevent varicose veins and deep vein thrombosis of lower extremities after delivery
  • It can reduce the soreness and discomfort of the lower limbs and prevent varicose veins of the lower limbs for long-term standing, sitting, and heavy physical labor
  • Skin-friendly and breathable fabric
  • The user looks slim after wearing it

page_json.name: Cofoe 1 Pair Thigh Compression Socks Level 2 Varicose Sock 23-32 mmHg Pressure Open Toe Leggings Compression Stockings for Men Women Anti-varicose Veins Eliminate Edema
page_json.description: The product is classified as assisted stockings for use, imposing certain amount of pressure on legs to prevent blood clot around legs and varicosit Gently press on leg muscles and fat, consume leg energy, prevent sagging, raise leg line, reduce leg circumference, and keep leg shape It is suitable for people with obvious varicose veins in the lower extremities and discomfort in the legs. Such as: leg pain, fatigue, numbness, itching, hyperpigmentation, patients after varicose vein surgery Eliminate lower extremity edema of women in the third trimester, prevent varicose veins and deep vein thrombosis of lower extremities after delivery It can reduce the soreness and discomfort of the lower limbs and prevent varicose veins of the lower limbs for long-term standing, sitting, and heavy physical labor Skin-friendly and breathable fabric The user looks slim after wearing it The product is classified as assisted stockings for use, imposing certain amount of pressure on legs to prevent blood clot around legs and varicosity. Applicable people:1.People who keep standing for long time, such as teachers,policemen,cosmetologists,shopping guides, doctors and nurses.2. People sitting for long time: IT practitioners, white collar workers and civil servants. These people tend to stand or sit for long time. The subsequent muscle fatigue and gravitation could lead to improper backflow of blood in legs and further lower extremity venous-related diseases.3. women and those who keep taking contraceptives —internal hormone alters and weight increases during pregnancy, the fetus and enlarged womb oppress pelvic venous and iliac vein, venous pressure increase in legs, all these could lead to improper backflow of blood in legs and further lower extremity venous-related diseases.4. People who frequently take business trips by plane and coach like stewardess are vulnerable to “economy class syndrome” owing to the improper backflow of blood in legs caused by weightlessness at high altitude. They may fall victim to lower extremity venous-related diseases and even pulmonary embolism.5. People suffering obesity. High-level cholesterol and lipid in blood can make blood backflow difficult, causing lower extremity venous-related diseases.6. People who are much likely to fall victim to deep venous thrombosis, such as those suffering from malignant tumors, hemiplegic symptoms and broken legs and people just received an operation, women at the final stage of pregnancy and delivery women as well as the elderly.7. People who want to have well-shaped legs and those going through liposuction. The stockings can compress, lift, pull and group the muscles in legs to prevent sagging and remedy shape of legs. Notes:Please allow 1-2cm(0.4-0.8") differences due to manual measurement, thanks.

product.highlights:
• Composition: 70 % Nylon Polyamide | 30 % Elastane
  • Simple construction: Basic yarns make the stocking cost-effective.
  • Anatomically knitted: VENOSAN® 6000 for maximum comfort.
  • Ease of care: Can be machine washed at 40°C on a delicates programme. Dries naturally overnight.
  • Slight transparency
  • The economical stocking which nevertheless satisfies all requirements.
  • Long-term treatment of phlebological and/ or lymphatic diseases in the case of legs.
  • Varicosis: Primary and secondary varicosis, varicosis during pregnancy, after sclerotherapy, after vein surgery.
  • Thromboembolism: Thrombophlebitis (superficial) as well as after treatment of phlebitis, deep venous thrombosis, after thrombosis, post-thrombotic syndrome, prophylaxis of thrombosis for ambulatory patients.
  • Chronic venous insufficiency: CVI grades I to III according to Widmer, C1S-C6 according to CEAP, prevention of venous ulcers, insufficiency of the communicating veins, angiodysplasia.
  • Oedemas: Lymphoedema, oedema during pregnancy, post-traumatic oedema, postoperative oedema, idiopathic cyclic oedema, grade II lipoedema and above, congestive conditions following prolonged immobility (arthrogenic stasis syndrome, paralysis and partial paralysis of the limb).
  • Other: After burns, hypertrophic scarring

page_json.name: Venosan 6000 Compression Stockings CCL1
page_json.description: Venosan 6000 Compression Stockings offer 18-21mm Hg pressure for effective varicose vein management. These anatomically knitted, machine-washable stockings are available in various colors and sizes, suitable for long-term treatment of venous insufficiency and thrombosis prevention. - Lazada

title: 1Pair Medical Open Toe Thigh High Compression Stockings with Silicone Band for Women & Men,Firm 20-30 mmHg Graduated Support
detail_text: Package: 2Pcs/Pair * Women's Thigh Compression Sleeve Features: - High quality compression and fabric retains shape after wearing and washing - Supports thighs with a snug fit without restricting range of motion - Alleviate thigh cramping and pain - Improved muscle recovery post workout with the thigh sleeve - Moisture wicking, anti-odor, soft material - Seamless design allows for superior comfort with no chafing or irritation - Spandex & Lycra , High quality compression and fabric retains shape after wearing and washing - Relieve Quad and Hamstring Pain: Compression in the thigh sleeve helps to support the quad and hamstring to relieve pain and reduce the chance of injury.
detail_html:
Package:

2Pcs/Pair *  Women's Thigh Compression Sleeve

Features:

- High quality compression and fabric retains shape after wearing and washing

   - Supports thighs with a snug fit without restricting range of motion

   - Alleviate thigh cramping and pain

   - Improved muscle recovery post workout with the thigh sleeve

   - Moisture wicking, anti-odor, soft material

   - Seamless design allows for superior comfort with no chafing or irritation

   - Spandex & Lycra,High quality compression and fabric retains shape after wearing and washing

   - Relieve Quad and Hamstring Pain: Compression in the thigh sleeve helps to support the quad and hamstring to relieve pain and reduce the chance of injury.

detail_blocks.text: Package: 2Pcs/Pair * Women's Thigh Compression Sleeve Features: - High quality compression and fabric retains shape after wearing and washing - Supports thighs with a snug fit without restricting range of motion - Alleviate thigh cramping and pain - Improved muscle recovery post workout with the thigh sleeve - Moisture wicking, anti-odor, soft material - Seamless design allows for superior comfort with no chafing or irritation - Spandex & Lycra , High quality compression and fabric retains shape after wearing and washing - Relieve Quad and Hamstring Pain: Compression in the thigh sleeve helps to support the quad and hamstring to relieve pain and reduce the chance of injury.

aiTexts: The 1Pair Medical Open Toe Thigh High Compression Stockings are a must-have for athletes and active individuals.
With their firm 20-30 mmHg graduated support, these stockings provide optimal compression to improve blood circulation and reduce muscle fatigue.
The open toe design allows for breathability and flexibility, while the silicone band ensures a secure fit throughout any physical activity.
Suitable for both men and women, these compression stockings are perfect for football players and other team sports enthusiasts.
With no warranty, these stockings are designed to last and provide long-lasting support for your legs.

   - Seamless design allows for superior comfort with no chafing or irritation

   - Spandex & Lycra,High quality compression and fabric retains shape after wearing and washing

   - Relieve Quad and Hamstring Pain: Compression in the thigh sleeve helps to support the quad and hamstring to relieve pain and reduce the chance of injury.

detail_text: Ⅱ Class Compression Socks Medical Varicose Vein Stockings Knee High Compression Stocking Product Details: Compression Level: Medical Compression Cass 2 (23-32 mmHg) Colour: Beige/skin Style: open-toe, thigh length, unisex Fabric Content: 14% cotton, 52% polyamide, 34% elasthan Features: Made with cotton blended fabric The cotton yarn is knitted on the inside of the stockings so that 100% cotton rests against the skin Ideal for those with sensitive skin Ideal of hot and cold climate conditions Provides graduated compression from ankle to thigh Quadrinova knobbed grip top is gentle on the skin and prevents the stocking from slipping Made in Switzerland and certified by RAL Care Instructions: Washing: Hand wash in lukewarm water Use a mild detergent to avoid the fabric breaking down Do not use fabric softeners, bleach, or harsh chemicals Drying: Get the excess water out of your compression garment by balling it up and squeezing gently. Do not twist Lay on a flat surface to air-dry. Do not hang the garment Do not dry directly in the sun or in the dryer Do not iron
detail_html:
Ⅱ Class Compression Socks Medical Varicose Vein Stockings Knee High Compression Stocking

Product Details:

Compression Level: Medical Compression Cass 2 (23-32 mmHg)

Colour: Beige/skin

Style: open-toe, thigh length, unisex

Fabric Content: 14% cotton, 52% polyamide, 34% elasthan

Features:

Made with cotton blended fabric

The cotton yarn is knitted on the inside of the stockings so that 100% cotton rests against the skin

Ideal for those with sensitive skin

Ideal of hot and cold climate conditions

Provides graduated compression from ankle to thigh

Quadrinova knobbed grip top is gentle on the skin and prevents the stocking from slipping

Made in Switzerland and certified by RAL

Care Instructions:

Washing:

Hand wash in lukewarm water

Use a mild detergent to avoid the fabric breaking down

Do not use fabric softeners, bleach, or harsh chemicals

Drying:

Get the excess water out of your compression garment by balling it up and squeezing gently. Do not twist

Lay on a flat surface to air-dry. Do not hang the garment

Do not dry directly in the sun or in the dryer

Do not iron

product.desc:
Ⅱ Class Compression Socks Medical Varicose Vein Stockings Knee High Compression Stocking

Product Details:

Compression Level: Medical Compression Cass 2 (23-32 mmHg)

Colour: Beige/skin

Style: open-toe, thigh length, unisex

Fabric Content: 14% cotton, 52% polyamide, 34% elasthan

Features:

Made with cotton blended fabric

The cotton yarn is knitted on the inside of the stockings so that 100% cotton rests against the skin

Ideal for those with sensitive skin

Ideal of hot and cold climate conditions

Provides graduated compression from ankle to thigh

Quadrinova knobbed grip top is gentle on the skin and prevents the stocking from slipping

Made in Switzerland and certified by RAL

Care Instructions:

Washing:

Hand wash in lukewarm water

Use a mild detergent to avoid the fabric breaking down

Do not use fabric softeners, bleach, or harsh chemicals

Drying:

Get the excess water out of your compression garment by balling it up and squeezing gently. Do not twist

Lay on a flat surface to air-dry. Do not hang the garment

Do not dry directly in the sun or in the dryer

Do not iron

title: +MD Thigh High Compression Stockings Open-Toe 20-30mmHg Firm Medical Support Socks for Varicose Vein Swollen legs
detail_text: 82.8% Nylon, 17.2% Spandex ✅【Treatment & Prevention】- 20-30 mmHg Medical Compression Stockings for Women & Men - Help prevent and relieve swelling, varicose veins, tired legs, leg & ankle swelling, edema, DVT, blood clots; Post-surgery when inactive or bed ridden to help reduce the danger of thromboembolic disease. In addition, these medical compression leggings for women circulation keep you warm and protected from the cold. With our support hose, you will notice the change even if you wear these a few hours every day! ✅【20-30 mmHg Graduated Compression】- It applies the greatest pressure at the ankle and decreases gradually up the leg to promote healthy circulation and keep you feeling energized. It also helps reduce and prevent swelling for the wearer, able to be effective reduce muscle cramping while re-energizing tired legs and effectively solve the problem of inflammation of the legs and feet, maintaining the leg health. These thigh high leg sleeves will be a tight fit when first worn, it's normal. ✅【Body Shaping & Beautiful Healthy】- Our thigh high compression socks for women 20-30 mmHg open toe closely fit your legs without slipping or shaking, super flexible without restricting your activities, help shape your body, make you more beautiful and sexier. If conditions permit, we strongly recommend buying two pairs, alternately using them which will double their life.Compression leggings for women & men 20-30mmHg - Healthier, better feeling! ✅【Daily Use】- Unobtrusive and stylish design for walking, traveling and all attire from casual to work, dress or formal; These medical compression stockings thigh high are perfect for teachers, nurses, people with varicose veins, pregnant women, flight attendants, or people who often have to do long-standing or long time to maintain a posture, comfortable all day. 20-30 mmHg compression hose for women & men which promote blood circulation, great for relieving tired, aching, fatigued legs. ✅【All Day Comfort】- Silicone grip dot-top lining prevents rolling and slipping, which helps the thigh high support socks stay in place throughout the day; High-quality medical fabrics - 82.8% Nylon, 17.2% Spandex - air-covered spandex thicker yarn soft touch, comfortable all day wear. Toeless design for inspection, increased comfort, and sandal footwear; Moderate support, unisex thigh highs, Doctor-recommended, 20-30 mmHg graduated compression thigh high support stockings! Warm reminder: This style is slim and tight, if you have thick legs, it is recommended to order a size up."

title: NEENCA Medical Thigh High Compression Stockings for Men and Women, Pair, Open Toe, 20-30 mmHg Graduated Support Thigh Length Hose, Dot Top, Opaque, Best for Varicose Veins, Edema, Flight
detail_text: Specifications BrandNeencaSKU3037150469_SGAMZ-20720279084Applicable AreaLeg What’s in the box 1 Pair Medical Thigh High Compression Stockings Highlights 75% Nylon, 25% Spandex 【Treatment & Prevention】- 20-30 mmHg Medical Compression Stockings for Women & Men - Help prevent and relieve swelling, varicose veins, tired legs, leg & ankle swelling, edema, DVT, blood clots; Post-surgery when inactive or bed ridden to help reduce the danger of thromboembolic disease. In addition, these medical compression leggings for women circulation keep you warm and protected from the cold. With our support hose, you will notice the change even if you wear these a few hours every day! 【20-30 mmHg Graduated Compression】- It applies the greatest pressure at the ankle and decreases gradually up the leg to promote healthy circulation and keep you feeling energized. It also helps reduce and prevent swelling for the wearer, able to be effective reduce muscle cramping while re-energizing tired legs and effectively solve the problem of inflammation of the legs and feet, maintaining the leg health. These thigh high leg sleeves will be a tight fit when first worn, it's normal. 【Body Shaping & Beautiful Healthy】- Our thigh high compression socks for women 20-30 mmHg open toe closely fit your legs without slipping or shaking, super flexible without restricting your activities, help shape your body, make you more beautiful and sexier. If conditions permit, we strongly recommend buying two pairs, alternately using them which will double their life. 【Daily Use】- Unobtrusive and stylish design for walking, traveling and all attire from casual to work, dress or formal; These medical compression stockings thigh high are perfect for teachers, nurses, people with varicose veins, pregnant women, flight attendants, or people who often have to do long-standing or long time to maintain a posture, comfortable all day. NEENCA 20-30 mmHg compression hose for women & men which promote blood circulation, great for relieving tired, aching, fatigued legs. 【All Day Comfort】- Silicone grip dot-top lining prevents rolling and slipping, which helps the thigh high support socks stay in place throughout the day; High-quality medical fabrics - 70% Nylon, 30% Spandex - air-covered spandex thicker yarn soft touch, comfortable all day wear. Toeless design for inspection, increased comfort, and sandal footwear; Moderate support, unisex thigh highs, Doctor-recommended, NEENCA 20-30 mmHg graduated compression thigh high support stockings! title: MERMAI Unisex Soft Flight Compression Socks Stockings Knee High Anti-Fatigue
detail_text: Style: Fashion, Casual Seasons: Spring, Summer, Autumn, Winter Material: Nylon Gender: Unisex Type: Compression Socks Function: Shaping Features: Knee Stockings, Soft and Comfortable Comfortable balloon toe and heel pocket. Thin, lightweight nylon material. Non-binding, breathable, comfort top band. Anti-fatigue compression sock, soothe tired, achy legs and feet! Use graduated compression, maximum at the ankle that gradually decreases up the leg, to soothe, massage and energize your legs and feet. Comfortable and discreet, thin enough to fit in any shoe. Helps to reduce swelling, boost circulation, control odors, soothe and massage achy legs and feet, relieve symptoms of varicose veins. Easy to put on, great for everyday use. Unisex. Perfect for being on your feet or sitting all day and traveling! Package Includes:1 Pair of Compression Socks

Thin, lightweight nylon material.

Non-binding, breathable, comfort top band.

Anti-fatigue compression sock, soothe tired, achy legs and feet!

Use graduated compression, maximum at the ankle that gradually decreases up the leg, to soothe, massage and energize your legs and feet.

Comfortable and discreet, thin enough to fit in any shoe.

Helps to reduce swelling, boost circulation, control odors, soothe and massage achy legs and feet, relieve symptoms of varicose veins.

Easy to put on, great for everyday use.

Unisex. Perfect for being on your feet or sitting all day and traveling!

Package Includes:1 Pair of Compression Socks

title: Cofoe 34-46mmHg Medical Compression Socks Level 3 High Pressure Varicose Veins Stockings Open Toe Thigh Calf Leg Sock for Men Women Anti Embolic Sock Blood Circulation Relief Serious Edema (please use it under the guidance of doctor)
detail_text: Product parameters Name: medical varicose veins compression socks Material: spandex, nylon Style: mid-calf socks, pedal toe, pedal toe Color: black / skin color Pressure: primary, secondary, tertiary Size: S/M/L/XL Scope of application: suitable for promoting venous blood flow in the lower limbs, preventing deep vein thrombosis and relieving the symptoms of varicose veins in the lower limbs Care instructions: It is advisable to wash with warm water below 45℃, it is recommended to have 2 pairs of medical varicose veins socks for replacement, please dry in a cool and ventilated place, avoid direct sunlight to avoid destroying the elasticity.
detail_html:
Product parameters

Name: medical varicose veins compression socks

Material: spandex, nylon

Style: mid-calf socks, pedal toe, pedal toe

Color: black / skin color

Pressure: primary, secondary, tertiary

Size: S/M/L/XL

Scope of application: suitable for promoting venous blood flow in the lower limbs, preventing deep vein thrombosis and relieving the symptoms of varicose veins in the lower limbs

Care instructions: It is advisable to wash with warm water below 45℃, it is recommended to have 2 pairs of medical varicose veins socks for replacement, please dry in a cool and ventilated place, avoid direct sunlight to avoid destroying the elasticity.

product.desc:
Product parameters

Name: medical varicose veins compression socks

Material: spandex, nylon

Style: mid-calf socks, pedal toe, pedal toe

Color: black / skin color

Pressure: primary, secondary, tertiary

Size: S/M/L/XL

Scope of application: suitable for promoting venous blood flow in the lower limbs, preventing deep vein thrombosis and relieving the symptoms of varicose veins in the lower limbs

Care instructions: It is advisable to wash with warm water below 45℃, it is recommended to have 2 pairs of medical varicose veins socks for replacement, please dry in a cool and ventilated place, avoid direct sunlight to avoid destroying the elasticity.
product.highlights:
• Gradual decreasing pressure in both directions, skin-friendly and breathable
  • Progressive gradient pressure to assist blood flow back
  • Spiral knitting process, wear-resistant and anti-hooking
  • 360° arc knitting method, better fit the leg line
  • Stereoscopic fit, not picky body
  • Refreshing and non-sweaty, fine details
product.title: Cofoe 34-46mmHg Medical Compression Socks Level 3 High Pressure Varicose Veins Stockings Open Toe Thigh Calf Leg Sock for Men Women Anti Embolic Sock Blood Circulation Relief Serious Edema (please use it under the guidance of doctor)

title: 3pairs/Lot Men's Socks Compression Stockings Breathable Basketball Sports Cycling Socks Moisture Wicking High Elastic Tube Socks
detail_text: • High Elasticity : These men's socks feature high elasticity, providing a comfortable fit and allowing for freedom of movement during your activities. • Moisture Wicking : The moisture wicking feature of these socks ensures they stay dry and comfortable throughout your day, making them perfect for sports or cycling. • Breathable Material : Made from breathable polyester, these socks allow for air circulation, keeping your feet cool and dry even during intense activities. • Versatile Use : Whether you're playing basketball, cycling, or just lounging, these socks are versatile enough to meet your needs. • Deep Tube Design : The deep tube design of these socks offers extra support and protection, making them ideal for high-impact activities. • Thickness : These socks are thicker than typical, providing additional durability and protection against wear and tear. Description Sweat-resistant and anti-odor technology keeps your feet fresh and dry all day Made with soft and breathable cotton for ultimate comfort Color block design adds a stylish touch to your athletic wear Crew length provides ample coverage and support Perfect for sports, workouts, and everyday wear
detail_html:
• High Elasticity :These men's socks feature high elasticity, providing a comfortable fit and allowing for freedom of movement during your activities.


• Moisture Wicking :The moisture wicking feature of these socks ensures they stay dry and comfortable throughout your day, making them perfect for sports or cycling.


• Breathable Material :Made from breathable polyester, these socks allow for air circulation, keeping your feet cool and dry even during intense activities.


• Versatile Use :Whether you're playing basketball, cycling, or just lounging, these socks are versatile enough to meet your needs.


• Deep Tube Design :The deep tube design of these socks offers extra support and protection, making them ideal for high-impact activities.


• Thickness :These socks are thicker than typical, providing additional durability and protection against wear and tear.



Description
Sweat-resistant and anti-odor technology keeps your feet fresh and dry all day
Made with soft and breathable cotton for ultimate comfort
Color block design adds a stylish touch to your athletic wear
Crew length provides ample coverage and support
Perfect for sports, workouts, and everyday wear
